title: Open  - 13 April 2026 - Part 102
content: It couldn’t. And yet, resign... Amma’s spirit made me speak the truth”) briefly sug-                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 to regain organisation. Under EPS, AIADMK acquired a certain late-night rebellion at Jayalalithaa’s memorial (“I was forced to                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                been beneath the spectacle—a leader-centric movement forced but at the time it was messy and intimate in its betrayals. OPS’                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               it recalibrated. The party became what it had perhaps always What unfolded next has since hardened into political folklore,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     AIADMK itself. Stripped of its central figure, it did not collapse; imity, because inheritance could be claimed by close association.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    What this decade sans Jayalalithaa revealed was the nature of Jayalalithaa’s confidante, who moved with the assurance of prox-                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          partner in a national coalition.
